content.headline: Mesa Verde retires the 1990s loader and grader line
content.body_html:
After decades of service, Mesa Verde Paving and Gravel is retiring the 1990s wheel loader and motor grader line. Approximately {{fleet_figure_placeholder}} units are moving into decommission staging through the fall of 2026.

We are grateful to the crews who kept this fleet running through every season the San Juan basin threw at us. If you were part of the 1990s line, thank you.

More details to follow after the internal review closes on November 13.

notes: Draft alumni-page announcement. Reviewer list includes Sophia. Fleet figure merge tag is a placeholder to be filled in after Sophia's fleet verdict table is finalized in the deliverable brief; the placeholder is retained until HR decides what number to publish. Sophia may edit the draft body during the engagement window but has no schedule or publish permission.
